summary: HR Module Consolidated Testing Complete - All 6 tabs verified (Employees, Attendance, Payroll, Leave, Roles, Countries). Employee detail modal with sub-tabs (Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents) working correctly. Salary tab shows earnings/deductions with Gross/Net calculation. /admin route correctly redirects to /hr.

ui_bugs.issue: Login Time shows 'Invalid Date' for all active sessions

passed_tests: CEO login (ceo@wisedrive.com / password123)
Navigate to HR Module tab from navigation
All 6 tabs visible: Employees, Attendance, Payroll, Leave, Roles, Countries
Employees Tab: Employee list with columns (Employee, Roles, Country, Weekly Off, Status, Salary, Audit, Actions)
Employees Tab: Summary cards (Total Employees: 19, Active: 19, Exited: 0, Countries: 4)
Employees Tab: Add Employee button opens modal with form fields
Employees Tab: Click employee view button opens detail modal
Employee Modal: Sub-tabs exist (Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents)
Employee Modal - Details Tab: Shows Full Name, Email, Phone, Country, Weekly Off, Assign Roles
Employee Modal - Salary Tab: Earnings section (Basic Salary, HRA, Variable Pay, Conveyance, Medical, Special Allowance)
Employee Modal - Salary Tab: Gross Salary calculation displayed
Employee Modal - Salary Tab: Deductions section (PF, Professional Tax, Income Tax, Other Deductions)
Employee Modal - Salary Tab: Net Salary (Take Home) calculation displayed
Employee Modal - Salary Tab: Save Salary Structure button
Roles Tab: All 8 preset role cards displayed (CEO, HR Manager, Finance Manager, Country Head, Sales Head, Sales Executive, Inspection Head, Mechanic)
Roles Tab: Each role shows PAGE ACCESS permissions with (Edit)/(View) badges
Roles Tab: Custom Roles section (Sales Lead, Inspection Lead)
Roles Tab: Add Role button visible
Countries Tab: Table with columns (Country, Code, Currency, Phone Code, Employees, Status, Actions)
Countries Tab: 4 countries displayed (India, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines)
Countries Tab: Currency symbols and phone codes displayed correctly
Countries Tab: Add Country button visible
Attendance Tab: Active Sessions view with table (Employee, Login Time, Duration, Last Activity, Status, Actions)
Attendance Tab: Records view button
Attendance Tab: Pending Approvals view button (HR only)
Attendance Tab: Country filter and refresh button
Leave Tab: My Leave and Approvals view buttons
Leave Tab: Leave balance display (Casual 0/12, Sick 0/6)
Leave Tab: Apply Leave button
Leave Tab: Leave requests table with status badges (PENDING, REJECTED, CANCELLED, APPROVED)
Payroll Tab: Summary cards (Total Payroll, Paid, Pending)
Payroll Tab: Generate Payroll button
Payroll Tab: Payroll table with columns (Employee, Period, Gross, Deductions, Net Pay, Status, Actions)
Payroll Tab: Pay and Payslip action buttons
/admin route redirects to /hr correctly
action_items: Minor: Fix 'Invalid Date' display in Attendance Active Sessions Login Time column
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module consolidated testing complete. All 6 tabs (Employees, Attendance, Payroll, Leave, Roles, Countries) are working. Employee detail modal has 4 sub-tabs (Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents). Salary tab shows full earnings/deductions breakdown with Gross/Net calculation. /admin redirects to /hr. Minor issue: Active Sessions shows 'Invalid Date' for login times.
